title: App parent board id on context in subitem level
excerpt: App parent board id on context on column extension in subitem level (currently, we are using workaround that is not 100%) : we don’t have a way to get parent board id from subitem column extension unless we use nested qu…

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: App parent board id on context on column extension in subitem level (currently, we are using workaround that is not 100%) : we don’t have a way to get parent board id from subitem column extension unless we use nested queries and that’s not very reliable, as the item can be deleted or non existent on sub board.
